title: Fairness in ML Path
description: Build fluency in Fairness in ML inside Ethics & Governance by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: AI Fairness
steps.summary: AI Fairness belongs to the Ethics & Governance area of AI/ML, within Fairness in ML. It sits inside Ethics & Governance / Fairness in ML. Start after Model Fairness and AI in Architecture. It opens into AI in Fairness Auditing and Ethical AI Agents / Agent Fairness & Safety.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.
